_comment: Each key is a breakfast item name, shown in the Breakfast dropdown. 'ingredients' is a list of strings and is combined into the shopping list on the results page, same as dinner recipes. 'instructions' is a short method. 'vegetarian' is true or false and controls the green asterisk marker. 'cost' is a plain number, no currency symbol — the 'currency' field in recipes.json sets which symbol is shown for it across the whole site.

Porridge with Berries.instructions: Simmer oats in milk for 5 mins, stirring often. Top with berries and a drizzle of honey.

Toast & Scrambled Eggs.instructions: Whisk eggs and scramble gently in butter over low heat. Serve with hot buttered toast.

Greek Yoghurt & Granola.instructions: Spoon yoghurt into a bowl, top with granola and a drizzle of honey.

Bacon & Egg Muffin.instructions: Grill the bacon, fry the egg, and stack both inside a toasted, buttered muffin.

Overnight Oats.instructions: Stir everything together in a jar and refrigerate overnight. Eat cold, straight from the jar.

Avocado on Toast.instructions: Toast the bread. Mash the avocado with lemon juice, salt and pepper, then spread on top and finish with chilli flakes.

Full English Breakfast.instructions: Grill the sausages and bacon, fry or grill the tomato, fry the egg, and warm the beans. Serve with buttered toast.

Pancakes with Maple Syrup.instructions: Whisk flour, eggs and milk into a smooth batter. Fry small ladlefuls in a buttered pan until bubbles form, then flip. Serve stacked with maple syrup.

Bagel with Cream Cheese.instructions: Slice and toast the bagel, then spread generously with cream cheese.

Berry & Banana Smoothie.instructions: Blend all the ingredients together until smooth, adding a splash more milk if it's too thick.
